fire.description: The air is thick with the stink of scorched wood and old ash. A passage waits beyond.
fire.search_result:
You spot soot-blackened pressure plates hidden in the grit and carefully wedge them shut. 
Proceeding cautiously to the next room
as
fire.trigger_text:
Hidden vents roar to life and gouts of flame wash over you!engulfed in the blaze, you stagger into the next room without any eyebrows
as

spikes.description: Dried rust-brown stains streak the flagstones. Something about the floor feels wrong.
spikes.search_result:
You find the seams of a spring-loaded floor and pin the mechanism in place.
Proceeding cautiously to the next room
as
spikes.trigger_text:
The floor drops and a rack of iron spikes slams up through it!pierced by the spikes, you struggle to your feet and stagger into the next room
as

false_fountain.description: A fountain burbles in the corner, its water glinting and inviting. A passage lies past it.
false_fountain.search_result:
As you scan the room, you notice a tripwire concealed leading up to the fountain's surface. 
as you carefully step over it, you spot a hidden latch on the fountain's base and secure it.
and seeing the fountain's water is actually a thin layer of acid, you carefully avoid it.
Proceeding cautiously to the next room
as
false_fountain.trigger_text:
There was a tripwire! The fountain's water turns to acid and sprays you with a scalding blast!
realling from the burns, you stumble into the next room
as

no_exit.description: The corridor folds back on itself again and again. The way onward is not obvious.
no_exit.search_result:
Tracing the draft, you find a seam in the wall that opens onto the true passage,to the next room
as
no_exit.trigger_text:
You blunder through the false turns, and running into clotheslines and mirrors you eventually find the way out.
as

dart_wall.description: Tiny holes pock the stone wall, each one pointed toward the doorway. The air smells faintly metallic.
dart_wall.search_result:
You spot a row of hidden launchers and wedge their triggers shut.
Proceeding cautiously to the next room
as
dart_wall.trigger_text:
A panel snaps open and a spray of poisoned darts hisses out!stung by the darts, you lurch into the next room
as

swinging_axes.description: Rusty axes hang from chains overhead, each blade chipped and dull. A passage lies beyond them.
swinging_axes.search_result:
You notice the counterweights and jam the mechanism with a broken spear.
Proceeding cautiously to the next room
as
swinging_axes.trigger_text:
The chains jerk taut and the axes sweep down in a deadly arc!blades biting into your shoulder, you stumble onward
as

gas_cloud.description: The room smells faintly sweet and sickly. The air hangs still and heavy in the corners.
gas_cloud.search_result:
You find a cracked valve and turn it shut before the fumes can spread.
Proceeding cautiously to the next room
as
gas_cloud.trigger_text:
A hidden release lets loose a cloud of choking gas!gasping and coughing, you drag yourself into the next room
as

collapsing_floor.description: The floorboards are warped and uneven, with cracks running between them like veins.
collapsing_floor.search_result:
You brace the loose planks and discover the weak boards are only a thin disguise.
Proceeding cautiously to the next room
as
collapsing_floor.trigger_text:
The floor gives way under you and a section of stone drops away!scrambling for purchase, you tumble into the next room
as
